justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered relevant alternative appointment slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear and helpful responses at every turn.
